nasb.text: Heman’s brother Asaph stood at his right hand, even Asaph the son of Berechiah, the son of Shimea,

esv.text: and his brother Asaph, who stood on his right hand, namely, Asaph the son of Berechiah, son of Shimea,

cnv.text: 希幔的兄弟亞薩，就是站在希幔右邊供職的亞薩，是比利家的兒子，比利家是示米亞的兒子，

ccb.text: 希幔的族兄和助手亚萨是比利迦的儿子，比利迦是示米亚的儿子，
